name: Brownie Sheet Cake Icing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup NUTS (e.g., chopped walnuts or pecans)
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE MARGARINE, COCOA POWDER, AND MILK IN A LARGE BOWL.
2. HEAT THE MIXTURE OVER MEDIUM HEAT ON AN INDUSTRIAL STAND OR HOT PLATE UNTIL IT REACHES A BOIL.
3. BE CAREFUL NOT TO SCORCH THE MIXING COMPOUNDS WHILE THEY ARE BOILING.
4. REMOVE FROM HEAT AND ADD POWDERED SUGAR, NUTS, VANILLA EXTRACT, AND BUTTER FLAVORING (IF USING).
5. STIR UNTIL WELL-BLENDED.
6. SPREAD GENTLY OVER THE CAKE AS SOON AS IT IS REMOVED FROM THE OVEN.
